title: The Allure of Travel on the Dalton Highway
summary: Two longtime Alaskans share stories, advice, and a sense of wonder gained from years of travel on the Dalton Highway. The post The Allure of Travel on the Dalton Highway appeared first on Alaska Magazine .

title: Thank You to Pick.Click.Give. Donors!
summary: Over 200 people donated to the KUAC Friends Group through the 2021 Pick.Click.Give. program, raising $19,593 for the KUAC Friends Group.
